name: @codesift/eval
description: Evaluation harness and ripgrep parity gate for codesift.

scripts.bench: pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @codesift/core build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @codesift/mcp build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter codesift build && pnpm build && node ./dist/bench.js
scripts.bench:update: pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @codesift/core build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @codesift/mcp build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter codesift build && pnpm build && node ./dist/bench.js --update-losses
